reviews.review_description:
Ibisim Kart is a fantastic driving experience. Once you get to grips with the controls and you start setting laps, it's a great feeling. The driving feels fantastic. The recent addition of AI drivers snd being able to race them is welcomed. The game previously consisted of time trials only but it was still a great game as chasing times is always a strong motivation in racing games.

The circuits themselves are all a pleasure to drive, with a mixture of indoor and outdoor tracks. My personal favourites being Preston Short, Geneche and Rawal, the latter two being recent additions. You can also change time of day for the outdoor tracks and drive at night if you wish, which looks and feels very nice to drive in. And you can change the rate time passes on the outdoor circuits, so you can drive in day-night transitions and vice versa, which are handled well.

The karts themselves can be driven as either front-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive or all-wheel drive, each demanding its own level of skill to extract the most pace from the chosen machinery.

Overall, this is one of the best standalone VR driving titles, without a doubt. To the developer, I'd just say keep doing what you're doing. I've been playing this since the early days and it was just as much fun to drive then with more limited modes as it is now with further additions. Keep it up, I look forward to seeing where this title can go in future.

I bought this game really early into its development in the hope that it would grow into a better game later. I can definitely say that it is later and this game has lived up to all my hopes of what it may become. Good job devs.

reviews.review_title: A bit early but super fun
reviews.review_description: I got this game not really knowing what it had and wow it’s fun but it does get boring driving around by yourself without anything else to do like be able to refuel, change tires, or have anyone to race against which in my opinion is the biggest let down is no multiplayer or ai to race against although still early access I hope they add it soon as well as more tracks.

reviews.review_title: It’s a great game but needs multiplayer
reviews.review_description: I’ve had this game for a while now and the physics of it are very good but my main problem with it is that there is no one to race against so when they add multiplayer and more tracks this will undoubtedly be one of the best karting games on meta

absolutley brilliant game! really, it is a work of art and definitley worth the money but can you please consider adding multiplayer to it or at least ai racing because i feel very lonley when playing, also one more thing... Please make it so that you can drive any parked kart, not just the same specific one, thanks! absolutley awesome game otherwise tho!

reviews.review_title: Good game but it can do better
reviews.review_description: It’s a very fun and good game realistic too, but you’re driving alone and you can get bored￼ very fast I think he should create a multiplayer mode

So good! And the game seems to be in an early state. I played the demo and couldn’t stop myself from buying it to play more. It’s still pretty crude (menus, etc.), but the gameplay is just so incredibly good. The handling feels very stable and incredibly immersive. Yesterday, I even improvised a cockpit on my bed and played in the same position we use when racing karts—it was so much fun. Definitely going to follow the development closely.
Love this game. Can't wait for more tracks and features. The outdoor track is gonna be awesome when it drops

reviews.review_title: Pretty good for being in beta
reviews.review_description: This game is actually really fun I can’t wait for it to have multiplayer and hands + I can’t wait for more tracks to come but other then that this game is worth it I know a lot of people have trouble with getting in the  kart so this is how you have to go to the very back and find the different colored kart then walk up to it and it I’ll put you in. Other then that good game 👍
I love the game but please add hands to the game and make all the karts rideable and add more tracks but if you just add the hands the game will be 10 times better ￼￼

Game is zo p
Game is perfect.  very realistic as ive been to the track irl and it is exactly the same. Reslly good game I would highly recommend to everyonr.
Fast fun racing sim
Putting it into awd makes it so much fun but I wish I could my with npcs or friends plz update for that

developer_response.body: Thanks, opponents are being developed. Take a look on reddit or youtube for updates.

reviews.review_description:
Hi guys first thing you need to know if u try the 20 min version is to read this. I tried almost 20 min to figure out how to start but I'm glad I found the way. (Maybe a video tutorial at the beginning would be great).

First thing you need to do is go to the corner where you can find a helmet. This helmet is a nice detail for those who feel motion as it will focus your view if u get it. To grab things like the helmet or the 🛞 you need to grab them with the lateral bottoms on your controller. U can choose to wear it or leave it. 

Then near the column the last kart is the one u can choose. It has a different color. U just need to walk and approach to the kart and it will automatically put u on the sit. I was almost 20 min trying to ride the first kart in the first row 🥲 

Once you are in just right controller press it to move forward slowly and turn left to go to the track. Once you are out u have right to move forward and right to break. You will change gear with A. Which means if is gear 0 u can't move. If u press A is gear 1 so u can move forward. If u get sucked press X to go to 0 then X again to go to -1 then right controller push it and u move backwards. Then same thing to move forward A A then go on. Break is the hold button on the left controller (haven't used it much xD)

With this said, guys this is amazing it feels real and I hope more people join here so they can improve it more and more with new tracks and multiplayer. It would be nice to be able to use just our hands. It's really promising and I'm sure many people will try and think is not worth it if they can't continue. I really was about to leave it but good thing I kept on investigating more. 

Do you have a discord to follow up upcoming updates? I will be playing this game for sure a little everyday feel free to contact me if u need me to test something.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your invaluable feedback! For updates you can check out our reddit and youtube channel.

reviews.review_description: I can’t even drive one lap without getting stuck. I wish I could give this game negative stars. Frustrating. Waste of time.

developer_response.body:
Hi, I'm sorry your'e experiencing difficulties with the game. As the game is in it's early access stage, insructions haven't been added to the game yet. With players support, this game can be improved for a full release. 

In the meantime, if you'd like to see how the karts can be driven around the tracks check out our reddit page at reddit.com/r/ibisimKART. I've driven each track and set lap times for each combo as a temporary benchmark for players to compete against. Feedback on reddit is also welcome where I can provide support.

reviews.review_description:
This might just be the most underrated gem here. A solid racer which really captures the essence of ripping around a track in a go kart. Really good racing elements here that will feel incredibly familiar to any sim racers, but still very accessible for a casual gamer. 

The steering controls are good but could benefit from improvements to the controller tracking. It’s serviceable but once you start pushing to shave tenths off a lap that’s where the holes start to show. It’s one of standalone’s biggest issues when trying to steer without a wheel so hopefully they can dial this in, or maybe someone makes a wheel peripheral similar to the gun stocks. 

The physics feel great and nailing the corners at speed is very satisfying. 

Overall a fantastic karting experience, and really excited to see where this goes. Cheers!

developer_response.body:
Thanks! A sim like experience is exactly what I had in mind with this game and I'm glad to know the intent has translated well in your experience. One handed steering is more precise in VR I've found and averaging out two handed steering leads to a little imprecision naturally.  
Incidentally I've already designed and tested a 3D printable steering wheel peripheral for this game and initial tests work well. You can see it on the reddit page for this game.

reviews.review_description: For some reason, I can’t sit in the seat of the kart so it feels like I’m standing above or on the seat making it difficult to reach the steering wheel with my hands, not sure why this is though

developer_response.body: This will likely be either your player or seat height, both of which can be adjusted on the settings tower in each of the tracks.

reviews.review_description: Just got the game and already love it! I bought it expecting some bad things since it’s still a developing game, but no! Everything worked great including the hand tracking and the go karts are very realistic for a simulation and is fun to drive. I know it’s still in development so I’m not rushing anything but I do just have some suggestions. The first thing I would suggest would be adding some skins for the go karts that you could use And adding multiplayer. The second thing I would suggest is making some more maps which on the game looks like there’s more coming already. I just can’t get over the idea of me and my family all racing each other and a multiplayer go kart game. Sounds fun! Hoping y’all can reply and give me an update on y’all’s thoughts of a multiplayer mode and go kart skins! Have a great day and this is an  amazing game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5 stars, this really helps support the game. You can see another outdoor track which I've already created under our game name on social media sties. Multiplayer is also in the works as is AI,

reviews.review_description: I've had better luck since I learned how to put on the helment, I see I'm in the back cart, and can steer the wheel a bit, but can't seem to sitdown. Accelerator works but all I can do is bump the car in front of me. How you start the race???  Seems like fun but, needs instructions very very soon.   Thanks!

developer_response.body: Be sure to recentre your position and adjust the seat and player height settings on the settings tower at each track. The kart with the orange livery is fully driveable for hotlapping. AI is being developed at the moment.

reviews.review_description: Besides it not being what I was expecting, it won’t allow me to refund it after I just bought it today and only played it for 1 minute, if that. Hopefully something can come of this to be resolved.

developer_response.body:
Hello! The trial period is designed to help set expectations. Refunds policies are managed by Meta. Typically, their refund policy allows for up to 2 hours of playtime with certain conditions. Please refer to Meta's refund policies for details. 
I certainly wouldn't want anyone to buy a game they don't enjoy. For assistance with this issue, please contact Meta.

reviews.review_description: I was not able to sit in the kart

developer_response.body: Walk into the kart with the orange livery to take your seat.

reviews.review_description: Hi, do the pro controllers not work with this?

developer_response.body: The pro controllers should be supported. Take advantage of the trial period to test them out.

reviews.review_description: You can’t even race with ai but great graphics and awd and rwd are messed up

developer_response.body: Ai and multiplayer are being worked on, you can follow development on our social media pages. Please share further feedback on the drivetrain issues your'e experiencing either on our website, reddit or youtube.

reviews.review_description: This is the best racing game I’ve ever came across. It has better graphics then a few other racing games

developer_response.body: That's a great compliment! Thank you

reviews.review_description: How do u get in the go kart I have trouble doing that plz help and review

developer_response.body: Hi, walk towards the orange kart to be seated. The other karts cannot be driven yet.

reviews.review_description: Cant figure out how to reverse. Accidently did it one answered now I cant mobe forward. Help

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the good rating despite your trouble. The controls are shown on the reception desk and on the settings towers in each track. Press 'X' on the left controller to down shift and 'A' on the right controller to upshift. The gears cycle between -1, 0 and 1 for reverse, neutral and forwards respectively.

reviews.review_description: Hand tracking doesn't even work. I have to look at controllers and can't grab the wheel, which makes it hard to steer. It would be way more fun if I could see my hands and grab the wheel and steer better.

developer_response.body: Hand tracking hasn't been added due to the need to accelerate and brake with the triggers. I've developed thumbstick controls and xbox controller support for the next update as an alternative. You can share further feedback on our reddit page if you like.

reviews.review_description: No instructions on how to get into cart 🤨how no been able to figure out how to play

developer_response.body: As we develop the game we'll add instructions with time. You can simply walk or teleport towards the kart with the orange livery to be seated

reviews.review_description: Try to make the controller tracking better on the steering wheel . Add kart customisation and more tracks . Multiplayer would be amazing .

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, it is appreciated, We are actively developing the game.

reviews.review_description: 4 because it could be a lot better, add multiplayer please

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Multiplayer is currently being developed

reviews.review_description:
love this game. I cant get enough of it, it would be so much better with online play where you can ride with friends and family.
is there a date of when online mode will be available ?

developer_response.body: We look forward to doing the same but we don't have a timescale at the moment, you can checkout the reddit page for this game for updates

reviews.review_description: Game is fun! Looking forward to more maps and multiplayer!

developer_response.body: Thanks!

reviews.review_description: You should totally add in joondalup power play in Perth as a track, and I couldn’t quite figure out how to swap drivetrains or open a settings menu, you should give anyone that joined the game before February an ultra seasoned Karter title or something like that

developer_response.body: Thanks, the drivetrain can be changed from the settings towers, the confirm button then applies the setting.
